title: Understanding Angular Momentum
text: Angular momentum (L) for a hoop is calculated using the formula $$L=I \omega$$, where I is the moment of inertia and ω is the angular velocity.

title: Moment of Inertia for a Hoop
text: The moment of inertia (I) for a hoop is given by $$I=m r^2$$, where $$m$$ is the mass and $$r$$ is the radius of the hoop.

title: Calculating Angular Velocity
text: Angular velocity (ω) can be calculated using the formula $$ω=\frac{v}{r}$$, where v is the linear velocity and $$r$$ is the radius.

title: Calculate Moment of Inertia
text: Using the formula $$I=m r^2$$, calculate the moment of inertia of the wheel. Given: $$m=0.75$$ kg, $$r=0.35$$ $$m$$.

title: Calculate Angular Velocity
text: Using the formula $$ω=\frac{v}{r}$$, calculate the angular velocity of the wheel. Given: $$v=10.0$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$, $$r=0.35$$ $$m$$.

title: Calculate Angular Momentum
text: Using the formula $$L=I \omega$$, calculate the angular momentum of the wheel. Use $$I=0.091875$$ $$kg m^2$$ and $$ω=28.57$$ $$\frac{rad}{s}$$.
